steps.t: Raphûz asked for your help in gaining an audience with Ashâmi's father. He believes that rescuing his other daughter's husband from Ordâkhai captivity…
You succeeded in rescuing Ardub and culled many of the Ordâkhai from Ar-jirush. Return to Raphûz with the news.
Make your way across Jirush to Igbâl. Tell the man you rescued his daughter's husband.
Igbâl would not speak with you, but his translator drew your attention. You should speak with him.
Galamê, Igbâl's translator, asked you to inform Raphûz that they want to meet him at his earliest convenience. Return to Raphûz, at his location in Ji…
